description: Style Note The luxe comfort and rugged styling of lotto's footwear are now replicated in their Ridge floater sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. Product Details Plush straps over the forefoot, midfoot and back heel to lock the foot in place with Velcro closures Stitch detail on the straps Velcro closures for the fore foot and the midfoot Nubuck footbed with embossed branding Forefoot and midfoot strap connected Upper stitched to the outsole TPR outsole with multidirectional lugs and a curved midfoot Material and Care Synthetic, nubuck (leather) Dry clean only
